name: gogcli
description: Google Suite CLI: Gmail, GCal, GDrive, GContacts.
readme_summary: gogcli is a fast, script-friendly command-line interface for managing various Google Workspace services, including Gmail, Calendar, Drive, and more. It offers JSON-first output, support for multiple accounts, and secure credential management, making it ideal for automation and terminal-based workflows.
key_features: Calendar event management (create, update, conflicts, etc.)
Drive file management (list, search, upload, download, permissions)
primary_use_case: Managing and automating Google Workspace services directly from the command line.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled cartographer in a bustling, old-fashioned library, using a magical quill to draw detailed maps of interconnected digital realms. The cartographer consults glowing scrolls representing Gmail, Calendar, and Drive, with lines of light connecting them to form a cohesive network. Small, stylized icons of Google services float around the scene. The library shelves are filled with data books and code snippets. The overall mood is one of organized exploration and control. The image should be a 3D isometric illustration with a warm, inviting color palette and subtle digital particle effects, clearly showing the 'gogcli' name integrated into a map element.

name: portabase
description: Portabase - Database backup & restore tool for PostgreSQL, MySQL/MariaDB, MongoDB (more engines coming soon 🚀)
readme_summary: Portabase is a self-hosted, open-source tool designed to simplify database backup and restoration for PostgreSQL, MySQL/MariaDB, and MongoDB. It leverages a web UI and integrates with agents for secure and efficient operations, making database management accessible for developers and DevOps professionals.
key_features: Integrates with Portabase agents for secure operations
primary_use_case: Simplifying and automating database backups and restorations for various database engines in a self-hosted environment.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old librarian carefully organizing and duplicating ancient, glowing scrolls (representing databases) into secure, modern vaults. One vault is labeled 'Backup' and another 'Restore'. The librarian uses a digital magnifying glass that highlights data integrity. Subtle digital particles flow from the scrolls to the vaults. The repository name 'Portabase' is subtly etched on the librarian's spectacles. The scene is a cozy, well-lit library with a hint of futuristic technology. The style should be a warm, inviting 3D isometric illustration with clear iconography and a focus on the secure transfer of information.

name: geoai
description: GeoAI: Artificial Intelligence for Geospatial Data
readme_summary: GeoAI is a Python package that integrates artificial intelligence with geospatial data analysis. It provides tools for processing satellite imagery and vector data, training AI models for tasks like segmentation and classification, and visualizing results, with seamless integration into QGIS.
key_features: Interactive and programmatic search and download of remote sensing imagery and geospatial data
Automated dataset preparation with image chips and label generation
Model training for classification, detection, and segmentation
Inference pipelines for applying models to new geospatial datasets
Interactive visualization through integration with Leafmap and MapLibre
Seamless QGIS integration via a dedicated GeoAI plugin
Support for multiple data formats (GeoTIFF, JPEG2000, GeoJSON, Shapefile, GeoPackage)
Automatic device management for GPU acceleration
primary_use_case: Applying state-of-the-art deep learning models to geospatial data for analysis and visualization, accessible through Python and a QGIS plugin.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old owl, representing GeoAI, perched on a globe, meticulously sorting and analyzing glowing streams of satellite imagery and vector data. The owl uses its keen eyesight to identify patterns, transforming raw data into clear, illuminated maps and insights projected onto a nearby digital screen. Small, stylized icons representing PyTorch, QGIS, and data formats float around the owl. The background is a blend of a starry night sky and a subtle topographic map. The scene is rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with a color palette of deep blues, greens, and glowing oranges, emphasizing clarity and intelligence.

name: eclaire
description: Local-first, open-source AI assistant for your data. Unify tasks, notes, docs, photos, and bookmarks. Private, self-hosted, and extensible via APIs.
readme_summary: Eclaire is a self-hosted, local-first AI assistant designed to unify and process personal data, including tasks, notes, documents, photos, and bookmarks. It prioritizes privacy and extensibility, allowing users to run it entirely on their own hardware with local models and data storage.
key_features: Unifies diverse data types (tasks, notes, docs, photos, bookmarks)
Privacy-focused with local models and data storage
AI-powered content understanding, search, classification, OCR, and automation
Simplified self-hosting with unified deployment options
Support for various AI models and database backends (Postgres, SQLite)
primary_use_case: To provide a private, self-hosted AI assistant that can intelligently organize, search, and automate tasks across a user's diverse personal data without relying on cloud services.
cover_image_prompt: A wise, friendly librarian character in a cozy, personal library, surrounded by shelves overflowing with diverse data types: books (documents), scrolls (notes), framed photos, and neatly organized boxes (tasks). The librarian is using a magical magnifying glass that glows with AI energy, revealing connections and insights between these items, transforming them into organized streams of light. Subtle digital particles and small, clean UI elements showing data flow are visible. The scene is bathed in warm, inviting light, emphasizing privacy and personal control. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, approachable aesthetic, clearly depicting the unification and intelligent organization of personal data.

name: dockmon
description: DockMon - Modern Docker container monitoring with auto-restart and alerts
readme_summary: DockMon is a comprehensive platform for monitoring and managing Docker containers. It offers real-time insights, automated recovery, and multi-channel alerts for containerized applications.
primary_use_case: Monitoring and managing Docker containers across multiple hosts with automated restart and alerting capabilities.
cover_image_prompt: A vigilant, friendly robot conductor standing at a console, orchestrating a symphony of diverse Docker containers represented as musical instruments. The conductor uses glowing digital batons to guide the 'instruments,' ensuring they play in harmony (running smoothly) or gently nudging a struggling instrument back into rhythm (auto-restart). Small screens on the console display real-time metrics like CPU and memory usage as musical notes and waveforms. Alerts are visualized as subtle, colored light signals emanating from the console. The background is a clean, modern server room with soft, ambient lighting. The style is a 3D isometric illustration with a vibrant, tech-focused color palette, emphasizing clarity and control.

name: face_looker
description: Generate AI-powered gaze-tracking face images and create interactive React components that follow the cursor.
readme_summary: Face Looker is a project that generates AI-powered gaze-tracking face images and provides an interactive React component to display them. It allows users to create engaging UI elements where a face image dynamically follows the cursor's position.
key_features: Generate AI-powered face images with varying gaze directions
Create a sprite/grid sheet of all generated faces
Interactive React hook to make faces follow cursor
Option to use Replicate model for easy generation
Option to use Python script for advanced control over generation
primary_use_case: Creating interactive and engaging UI elements, such as portfolio headers or avatars, where a face image appears to follow the user's cursor.
cover_image_prompt: A whimsical, friendly robot character sitting at a digital desk. The robot is holding a tablet displaying a single portrait photo. From the tablet, streams of digital light flow into a large, ethereal eye floating above the desk. This eye is dynamically shifting its gaze, with subtle glowing lines connecting it to a cursor icon that is actively moving around the scene. The background is a clean, modern interface with soft, glowing UI elements and the 'Face Looker' logo subtly integrated into a digital display. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with a bright, inviting color palette, emphasizing interactivity and AI-driven personalization.
